'''Sorotarr VI''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Sorotarr system/Legends|Sorotarr system]]. It was the location of [[The Game]], a luxurious [[Casino/Legends|casino]].
